originalTitle: Manhunt after bomb injures Ukrainian oligarch in Monaco
summary: The blast was caused by an explosive device which appeared to contain bolts and pellets, the head of Monaco's government said.
content:
The front of a residential building in Monaco was damaged in the blast

A manhunt is under way in southern France after a parcel bomb exploded at a residential building in neighbouring Monaco, injuring wealthy Ukrainian businessman Vadym Yermolaiev and two others.

Two of the injured are in a critical condition in hospital in the French city of Nice, Monaco public prosecutor Stéphane Thibault said, adding that a woman was the most seriously hurt.

He said authorities were searching for a single suspect and the incident on Monday evening was being treated as attempted murder, not as a terrorist attack.

Ukraine's foreign ministry said its embassy in France was in touch with Monaco's authorities and was working to officially identify those reported injured in the blast.

The blast occurred shortly before 21:00 (19:00 GMT) at an apartment building on Rue Révérend Père Louis Frolla, near the border with France.

Monaco's government said the explosion had been caused by a parcel bomb, while the head of Monaco's government, Christophe Mirmand, told AFP news agency the explosive device had appeared to contain bolts and pellets.

Thibault said four other people had been treated by emergency services - one for shock and three for cuts from debris from nearby shop windows as a result of the blast.

On Tuesday morning, Mirmand told French broadcaster BFM TV the suspect appeared to "have left for France".

The Monaco government has said a suspect was seen on a video surveillance system fleeing towards the French commune of Beausoleil on foot after the explosion, where a major police effort to find them is now taking place.

Video surveillance images of the moments before the attack showed a man dropping a backpack in the lobby of a building shortly before the explosion, French newspaper Le Figaro reported.

More than 100 police and emergency personnel were deployed to the scene of the blast on Monday evening.

Harri Richie, who lives around 100m away from the targeted building, told the BBC she had heard an "unbelievably loud explosion" from the underground car park she was in.

She then went up to her 11th floor apartment, where she said she saw emergency services "dragging two people out [from the building] who looked badly injured".

Emergency services arrived around five minutes after the explosion, she said, adding that there was a helicopter overhead throughout the night.

"This is the first time in history, to my knowledge, that such an act has taken place in the principality," Mirmand said.

Monaco's Prince Albert II described the incident as a "heinous crime" and a "shock to the entire Monaco community".

Citing anonymous sources, French newspaper Le Figaro reports that the three victims seriously hurt in the attack are Yermolaiev, his partner and their 13-year-old son.

Yermolaiev, 58, is a wealthy real estate developer from Dnipro, Ukraine's fourth-largest city, who has been living in Monaco.

He is now a Cypriot citizen after renouncing his Ukrainian citizenship in 2019.

He has big interests in the wine and alcohol business in Russian-annexed Crimea, and since 2023 has been the subject of sanctions imposed by the government in Kyiv.

He was named the 39th richest Ukrainian by Forbes magazine in 2020, with a fortune of $230m (£173.8m).
chineseTitle: 摩纳哥乌克兰寡头炸弹炸伤后追捕
chineseSummary: 摩纳哥政府首脑表示，爆炸是由似乎含有螺栓和弹丸的爆炸装置引起的。
chineseContent:
摩纳哥一栋住宅楼的正面在爆炸中受损

邻国摩纳哥一座住宅楼发生包裹炸弹爆炸，乌克兰富商瓦迪姆·耶尔莫拉耶夫和另外两人受伤，法国南部正在进行搜捕行动。

摩纳哥检察官斯特凡·蒂博表示，其中两名伤者正在法国尼斯市的医院接受治疗，情况危急，并补充说，其中一名妇女伤势最重。

他说，当局正在寻找一名嫌疑人，周一晚上的事件被视为谋杀未遂，而不是恐怖袭击。

乌克兰外交部表示，其驻法国大使馆正在与摩纳哥当局保持联系，并正在努力正式确认爆炸中受伤人员的身份。

爆炸发生在 21:00（格林威治标准时间 19:00）前不久，地点为靠近法国边境的 Révérend Père Louis Frolla 街的一栋公寓楼。

摩纳哥政府表示，爆炸是由包裹炸弹引起的，而摩纳哥政府首脑克里斯托夫·米尔曼德告诉法新社，爆炸装置似乎包含螺栓和弹丸。

蒂博说，另外四人已接受紧急服务处理，其中一人因休克而受伤，三人因爆炸而被附近商店橱窗碎片割伤。

周二早上，米尔芒告诉法国广播公司 BFM TV，嫌疑人似乎“已前往法国”。

摩纳哥政府表示，视频监控系统显示一名嫌疑人在爆炸后徒步逃往法国博索莱伊公社，警方目前正在全力寻找他们。

据法国报纸《费加罗报》报道，袭击发生前的视频监控图像显示，爆炸前不久，一名男子将一个背包扔在一栋大楼的大厅里。

周一晚上，100 多名警察和急救人员被部署到爆炸现场。

哈里·里奇 (Harri Richie) 住在距离目标建筑约 100m 的地方，她告诉 BBC，她听到从她所在的地下停车场传来“令人难以置信的巨大爆炸声”。

然后她回到了自己位于 11 楼的公寓，在那里她说她看到紧急服务人员“从大楼里拖出了两个看上去受了重伤的人”。

她说，爆炸发生后五分钟左右，紧急服务人员赶到，并补充说，整个晚上都有一架直升机在头顶上空停留。

米尔曼德说：“据我所知，这是历史上第一次在公国发生这样的行为。”

摩纳哥亲王阿尔贝二世形容这一事件是“令人发指的罪行”，“震惊了整个摩纳哥社会”。

法国《费加罗报》援引匿名消息人士的话称，袭击中受重伤的三名受害者是叶尔莫拉耶夫、他的伴侣以及他们 13 岁的儿子。

58岁的叶尔莫拉耶夫是乌克兰第四大城市第聂伯罗的一位富有的房地产开发商，一直居住在摩纳哥。

2019 年放弃乌克兰国籍后，他现在是塞浦路斯公民。

他对俄罗斯吞并的克里米亚的葡萄酒和烈酒业务有着浓厚的兴趣，自 2023 年以来一直受到基辅政府制裁。

2020 年，他被福布斯杂志评为乌克兰第 39 位富豪，拥有 2.3 亿美元（1.738 亿英镑）的财富。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于全球新闻信号，适合用于观察外部环境、政策变化、地缘风险和市场情绪。
